releaseContents: Noindex y exclusión de sitemap, hubs y relacionados para temas ofensivos o con reportes abiertos.
Panel visual administrativo con embudo, métricas agregadas y actividad diaria.
SSE para avisos de cambios con polling de respaldo espaciado.
Ajustes conservadores de concurrencia y memoria para SQLite.
Carga diferida de mascota, PNG y cargador de Coloris.

backup.reason: No hay migraciones de tablas o columnas; los cambios de SQLite son PRAGMA compatibles y reversibles.

preDeployChecks.localQa: passed: 178 deterministic tests and 12 smoke tests
preDeployChecks.secretScan: no credential patterns found in the application diff
preDeployChecks.formatCheck: existing Prettier debt remains in 11 touched files; no bulk formatting was applied
preDeployChecks.branchSync: main matched origin/main before the release commit

postDeployVerification.shell: 200 with HSTS and CSP from https://www.topykly.com/
postDeployVerification.authentication: GET /api/auth/status returned 200 with configured Google, Turnstile and email checks
postDeployVerification.bootstrap: 200 guest payload with 15 topics, Secure HttpOnly cookie and no session ID in the body
postDeployVerification.authorization: anonymous dashboard, diagnostics and analytics requests returned 403
postDeployVerification.liveEvents: GET /api/live returned 200 text/event-stream and an initial ready event
postDeployVerification.seoEndpoints: robots.txt, sitemap.xml and terms returned 200 on the canonical www host
postDeployVerification.offensiveNoindex: one live offensive topic returned X-Robots-Tag noindex, meta noindex and was absent from sitemap.xml
postDeployVerification.deployedCode: SSE, stream safety interval, analytics panel and deferred mascot markers are live

browser.flow: topic list, topic selection, conversation rendering and return to list passed

rollback.databaseCompatibility: No schema migration was applied; the previous deploy can use the same database unchanged.
rollback.procedure: Redeploy dep-d9ck53svikkc73d21mfg if a code rollback is required. A database restore is not expected for this release.

unresolvedRisks: The original mascot image remains large when an empty state is opened, although it no longer affects initial loading.
The in-memory SSE hub and SQLite remain single-instance components; future horizontal scaling needs shared pub/sub and multi-instance persistence.
The initial ES-module graph remains broad even after removing deferred modules.
Repository-wide Prettier debt remains outside this release.
Render metrics and logs were not queried because no workspace was explicitly selected; deploy state, public endpoints, CI and browser checks showed no failure.
